title: Careers at Rosehill College
metaDescription: Rosehill College's Careers Department helps students take confident steps towards their future — with CV and interview help, study and training pathways, the Gateway programme and one-on-one careers appointments.

sections.heading: Careers at Rosehill College
sections.lede: At Rosehill College, our Careers Department is dedicated to helping students take confident steps towards their future — whether that path leads to employment, further study, trades, or something uniquely their own.

sections.heading: What we offer
sections.html:
We provide practical advice, personalised guidance, and real-world support to help students explore options and make informed choices.

Our Careers Team can help you:

  • Write CVs and cover letters
  • Prepare for job interviews and job hunting
  • Understand your driver licence options

sections.heading: Study and training pathways

image.alt: Students exploring career and study pathways at Rosehill College

sections.html:
Explore opportunities with:

  • Universities and polytechnics
  • Trades training and apprenticeships
  • Student exchange programmes
  • The armed forces

sections.heading: Gateway programme
sections.html: Get real-world experience through our Gateway work placements, designed to give students a taste of working life in different industries.

aside.html:
Book a careers appointment

Need help figuring out your next steps? Book a one-on-one session with our Careers Advisor for tailored advice and planning.

Email the Careers team at careers@rosehillcollege.school.nz.

sections.heading: Visit the Careers Portal
sections.text: Explore all of the above and more on our Careers Portal.

actions.label: Visit the Rosehill College Careers Portal
